title: XSLT
text: XSLT The Extensible Stylesheet Language for Transformations. A W3C recommendation that defines a declarative syntax for expressing the relationship between an input XML structure and an output structure. An XSLT processor can then transform an input XML stream into the output structure. The output structure can be XML, HTML, or text. XSLT is an XML grammar, and includes the XPath W3C recommendation.
